overview.description: Recurring reflection and planning surfaces. Each ritual has its own page with history and AI summary.

dailyPlan.title: Daily Plan
dailyPlan.highlightHint: The one thing that, if done, makes today a win.
dailyPlan.noOpenTasks: No open tasks for today yet. Add one above or capture with Cmd+K.
dailyPlan.planHint: The engine will auto-schedule selected tasks into your working hours, respecting existing calendar events.

dailyShutdown.title: Daily Shutdown
dailyShutdown.hint: Close the day cleanly. Reflect, then roll over what's left.
dailyShutdown.allDone: No open tasks left for today. Clean shutdown.
dailyShutdown.rollPrompt_one: {{count}} open task still on today. Roll it to tomorrow?
dailyShutdown.rollPrompt_other: {{count}} open tasks still on today. Roll them to tomorrow?
